termsOfServicePage.theseTermsConditionsGovernUse: These Terms and Conditions govern your use and access to AleForge LLC services. By accessing or using AleForge (“we”, “us”), you agree to these Terms. Whether you are a new user or an existing member, these Terms apply universally.

termsOfServicePage.initialServiceTermBeginsWhen: The initial service term begins when AleForge sends an activation message. Services renew automatically unless canceled via the client dashboard. All payments are billed in advance on a recurring cycle unless otherwise stated.
termsOfServicePage.whatMakesGoodHostingProvider: What Makes a Good Hosting Provider?
termsOfServicePage.strongGameServerHostingExperience: A strong game server hosting experience includes:
termsOfServicePage.maintainingSafeOnlineCommunityRequires: Maintaining a safe online community requires effective moderation. Game admins must enforce guidelines fairly and consistently.
termsOfServicePage.noCheatingExploitingBypassingSecurity: No cheating, exploiting, or bypassing security

termsOfServicePage.sectionDemonstratesHowLongText: This section demonstrates how long text blocks will appear in layout. Additional terms may be added depending on game server type, subscription model, or usage patterns.
termsOfServicePage.aleforgeReservesRightUpdateThese: AleForge reserves the right to update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the service signifies acceptance of the latest version.

refundPolicyPage.allServicesBilledAdvanceRenew: All services are billed in advance and renew automatically unless canceled by the customer.

refundPolicyPage.usersMustContactSupportWithin: Users must contact support within 7 days of the transaction with:
refundPolicyPage.aleforgeMayModifyRefundPolicy: AleForge may modify this Refund Policy at any time, and changes take effect once published.

usePolicyPage.theseTermsUseGovernAccess: These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of AleForge's hosting services. By creating an account or using our platform, you agree to these Terms.
usePolicyPage.theseTermsApplyAllUsers: These Terms apply to all users, including customers, visitors, and server administrators.
usePolicyPage.usersMustNotEngageFollowing: Users must not engage in the following activities:
usePolicyPage.hostingIllegalContentViolatingCopyright: Hosting illegal content or violating copyright laws
usePolicyPage.usingCheatsExploitsUnauthorizedModificat: Using cheats, exploits, or unauthorized modifications
usePolicyPage.runningHarmfulScriptsToolsAffect: Running harmful scripts or tools that affect server stability
usePolicyPage.attemptingBypassSecurityAccessRestricted: Attempting to bypass security or access restricted areas
usePolicyPage.whileAleforgeStrivesProvideStable: While AleForge strives to provide stable hosting performance, no service can guarantee 100% uptime. Scheduled maintenance or unexpected issues may cause temporary interruptions.
usePolicyPage.aleforgeReservesRightSuspendTerminate: AleForge reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms, misuse resources, or create security risks.
usePolicyPage.theseTermsMayUpdatedAny: These Terms may be updated at any time. Continued use of AleForge services constitutes acceptance of the latest version.

privacyPolicyPage.privacyPolicyExplainsHowAleforge: This Privacy Policy explains how AleForge (“we”, “us”, “our”) collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal information when you access or use our services. By using our platform, you acknowledge and agree to the practices described in this policy.

privacyPolicyPage.enhancingPerformanceSecurityUserExperien: Enhancing performance, security, and user experience
privacyPolicyPage.preventingFraudEnsuringFairUsage: Preventing fraud and ensuring fair usage
privacyPolicyPage.doNotSellPersonalData: We do not sell your personal data. We may share limited information with trusted third parties such as payment processors, infrastructure providers, and support platforms when necessary to operate our services.

However, no method of transmission or electronic storage is completely secure. Users are encouraged to maintain strong passwords and protect their account credentials.
